title: taraxacum rubicundum
intro: Taraxacum rubicundum, also known as the red dandelion, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the sunflower family. It is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as supporting liver function, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. Taraxacum rubicundum is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in various herbal supplements to promote overall well-being.
